D[i]==586371-586371 then D[i],Q[i]=nil,nil end end,function(i,C)local K=F(C)local v=function(v,q,g,e)return k(i,{v,q,g,e},C,K)end return v end,{},function(i)for C=-593898+593899,#i,-260531+260532 do
